items.title: England beat France in an epic World Cup third-place playoff – in pictures
items.summary: As England register their best World Cup finish since 1966, we bring you our pick of the images from Miami where Bukayo Saka’s hat-trick sealed a 6-4 victory for Thomas Tuchel’s...

items.title: Los Angeles Knight Riders pull off last-ball win for first MLC title
items.summary: The see-sawing match went down to the final over, bowled by Shadley van Schalkwyk, and then to the last ball, before a run out gave Los Angeles Knight Riders a one-run win
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
